While REFUSING to appropriately track down and fight *actual* terrorists who came into our country illegally, and quite literally legitimizing the *actual* Taliban as a government in Afghanistan, the Biden Admin instead targeted mothers and homemakers as terrorists claiming they promote "violent extremism?"

This, of course, while they also weaponized the Biden DOJ against Catholics to put young Christian families attending Traditional Latin Mass on terrorist wat

posts.text:
It’s honestly insane to me that we are even having to debate the importance of the SAVE Act.

How could you possibly support mandatory ID to drive a car, get on a plane, buy alcohol, stay at a hotel, open a bank account, apply for food stamps, & get married… but not to vote???

Great overview of why it matters 👇
bit.ly/4bzwk6H
